game.short_text: In There is a hand-drawn cinematic platformer made in 7 days for the Brackeys Game Jam 2023.2!
game.title: In There

details.title: In There
details.description:
In There is a cinematic platformer made in 7 days for the Brackeys Game Jam 2023.2. Theme: Diving Deeper 
It's a 10min long experience inspired by games like Abe's Odyssey and Heart of Darkness (with a dash of Gravity Rush!)
You play as a kid caught in what appears to be a never ending and eerie cavern. As he is plunging to his death, he discovers a mysterious ability that lets him suppress his gravity.
Run and float around to avoid the many dangers of an uncaring environment  Use your gems as light sources to unveil the darkness and surveil your surroundingsA dense hand-drawn atmosphere, at the midpoint between eerie and beautiful  
Made by me
---------------------------------------------
Controls
Play with Keyboard and Mouse! (no controller support)

ZQSD / Arrows to Move
Space / A to change Gravity
Left Mouse Button to Throw Rock-----------------------------------------⚠Known Bugs and Fixes⚠The geysers are permanently triggered (without any VFX). This will make the game impossible to beat. It happens if you die by smashing the ground in a room that has geysers and you respawn in the room before. Unfortunately, the only thing you can do is restart the game. Sorry about that!You're stuck behind the bouncy eyes. You can throw a bunch of rocks at them to trigger the bounce and try and slide your way between the eyes as they jiggle. Or you can bounce against them as fast as possible until the velocity kills you and you respawn normallyJust Unzip the folder and launch InThere.exe!

Only Keyboard and Mouse are supported

game.short_text: Dive Deeper into the icy sea on Jupiter's moon Europa with the EUR01
game.title: EUR01

details.title: EUR01
details.description:
EUR01
Explore the enigmatic moon Europa , guiding a lone drone on a daring descent into icy waters. Uncover the secrets of life below as you delve deeper into the depths

Explore a unique world with cool looks and awesome sounds that make you feel like you're really there!

As you guide the drone, you're also on a journey of finding out who you really are and what your mission is. Are you up for the challenge of exploring the unknown and finding hidden truths?
CONTROLS
Accellerate: Up-Arrow or W

Break:  Down-Arrow or S

Steer: Left-Arrow/Right-Arrow or A/D
Confirm/Lights: Space
Buy:  R

Tip: Use headphones for the best experiance
FEEDBACK
This first prototype is made in 1 week for the Brackeys Game Jam 2023.2 theme Dive Deeper. We have a lot of ideas for further improvement and want to develop EUR01 further. 
It would mean the world to us if you gave us your honest feedback on this prototype in the comments. Maybe you could answer the following questions: 
- What is your first reaction? - What do you like and/or dislike?- How would you see the ideal version of this game? - Would you buy that version on steam/console?
TEAM
Development: Bob HuijbregtsArt & design: Maarten van BroekhovenCREATION
All art is made within this week (actually in a few days) and so is the code. All music and sound effects come from Artlist and are edited to fit the game. 
Game engine:  Construct 3Art: Adobe Illustrator & Adobe XDAudio: Audacity and Artlist 
Not on a computer? 
Here is a gameplay overview of the prototype of EUR01. 

THANK YOU!
Thank you for your interest in EUR01. We really appreciate it. If you have any suggestions for further development, please don't hold back with your feedback. We would love to hear your opinion.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.0 out of 5 stars(2 total ratings)

game.short_text: The 2.5D puzzle platformer where you need to move into the third dimension to solve puzzles!
game.title: Divemensions

details.title: Divemensions
details.description:
WISHLIST ON STEAM HERE!
This game is a 2D puzzle platformer with a small twist... the world isn't truly 2D! Explore the possibilities of traversing a 2D environment with multiple layers you can move into! Solve puzzles, overcome challenges and more in Divemensions!
--Level Editor Beta Update!--
New Update! Try out the level editor WIP and share screenshots of your creations!
--Overview--
In this game you have a the power to go deeper into the third dimension, one that is very confusing for our little 2D protagonist, and with this power you can solve the puzzles found in this strange world, are you up to the challenge?
Go through 12 levels with new mechanics being introduced every 4 levels, and as an optional challenge you can try to get all 12 Stars, from all levels. 
--Controls--
-Playing-
- Move with A and D, Left and Right Arrow keys, Gamepad Joystick or D-Pad.
- Jump with Space or Gamepad South and East Face buttons.
- Switch between Depth levels with W and S, Up and Down Arrow Keys, Gamepad Joystick or D-Pad.
- Rotate the camera with Shift or Gamepad Triggers.
-Making-
- Use either the mouse or control the cursor with the left joystick of your gamepad of choice to move around, select options and edit the map.
- Press D or the West Face Button for a shortcut for the eraser.
- Move the camera with the arrow keys or the right joystick.
- Reset the view to keep editing with space or by pressing the right joystick button.
--Other Info--
This game was originally made for the Brackeys Gamejam 2023.2. Obtaining rank 8 in Game Design and rank 10 in Innovation!
Original Models, textures, sprites, sound effects, music and code were made during the jam.
The game features a Screen-Space Outline effect by Robinseibold: https://github.com/Robinseibold/Unity-URP-Outlines

details.title: Surviving The Deep
details.description:
This is an endless survival game made for the Brackeys Gamejam 2023.
Take control of your submarine and head as deep as possible before the ocean spits you back out! Challenge yourself to get as deep as possible before being overwhelmed by obstacles and angry inhabitants.
Compare your depth to your friends or others on the global leaderboard! When you are ingame, you can also mute all sound in the top left of the pause menu. (Escape)
Credits to https://danqzq.itch.io/ for releasing a great tool for online leaderboards. Look here if you want to try it yourself: https://danqzq.itch.io/leaderboard-creator

https://freesound.org/people/ProjectsU012/https://freesound.org/people/InspectorJ/https://freesound.org/people/aarrnnoo/You first need to download the file which is a zip.
Then unzip the file using a program like Winrar / 7zip which are free to download.
After that you have to open your unzipped file and open the "Build" folder and from there you start the file named "Surviving The Deep"!

game.short_text: A submission to the Brackeys Game Jam 2023
game.title: Periphery

details.title: Periphery
details.description:
About:
A curious self-taught scientist discovers a rift leading to a strange dark place—chaotic, but structured; geologically abundant, but biologically dangerous. 
Explore the new dimension and its different regions. Gather the precious resources found within. Annihilate the creatures that stop you, and collect their essence to enhance your equipment: your suit, your weapons, your jetpack, and the tether that keeps you connected to your world. Return home when you lack supplies or when things are too dangerous, but improve and continue diving deeper—until you reach the periphery. Then, end the source of the mystery. Do it all, as fast as you can.


Gameplay:
Dive into the rift. Collect resources.  Abort mission (or die). Upgrade your equipment. Dive again.

Objective:
Destroy the source of the rift in the deepest part of the dimension in as few days as possible.

Mechanics:
Fuel: Your jetpack runs out of fuel. You must return to camp when it runs out.
Boosting: You can boost to double your speed, at the cost of some extra fuel.
Resources: You must gather resources to upgrade your equipment. They can be mined from the terrain or dropped by slain enemies. To use them, you must bring them back to camp.
Weapons: You can carry a set of weapons each time you go into the rift. Each weapon only holds a few cartridges that can be recharged by going back to camp.
Tether: Your tether limits how deep you go in the rift. Its length can be increased by upgrading it in camp.
Aborting: You can return to camp by aborting the mission. This ends the day and brings home the resources for upgrading. Try to do as much as you can during each dive to the rift to minimize the number of days it takes to finish the game. If you die before aborting, you lose the resources you have and waste the day.

Controls:
At camp:

AD to moveW to interactS to close interface
In the rift:
WASD to moveSHIFT to boostHOLD ESC to abort missionMOUSE to aimLEFT CLICK to shootSCROLL WHEEL to switch weaponFor .exe: download it, then run it.
For .zip: download it, extract the file, then run it.

moreInfo.Author: Shrimp Moose

game.short_text: Face the wrath of bugs
game.title: BUGGED OUT

details.title: BUGGED OUT
details.description:
Intro: Remember that semicolon you missed? Remember that bracket you forgot? All the computer bugs in the code have caused the time space to warp, and our little developer “the Dude” is unfortunately sucked into the world of his own code. With monsters and enemies generated by the bugs he made, he now has to fight his way out of this buggy world. 
In this 2D platformer action game, fulfill your innermost desires, crush the bugs within your code and ensure a clean and concise document without error! 
Controls:

A, D: move left/right

SPACE: jump

J: Attack

J, while in air holding S: ground smash (how you destroy platforms)

game.short_text: Can you escape FOUR games at once?
game.title: Goodbye, Charlie

details.title: Goodbye, Charlie
details.description:
You're trapped in a game within a game within... well you get it.
Escape the house by diving deeper and deeper into 4 video game genres!
Fair warning, this is a difficult puzzle game so I hope you're up for a challenge (though if you get stuck, there is a full walk-through here). Each genre is intentionally limited so you will have to figure out how to best use each genre's unique and only abilities:
First Person: Grab and move small items and light furnitureRPG: Open/close objects and read journalsPlatformer: Jump high, collect keys and knock down hard to reach itemsText Adventure: Activate machinery and unlock doors/containers
Can you find your way out and puzzle together what happened to Charlie and your family? 
___________________________________________________________________________________
Controls 
First Person: WASD + Mouse. E to grab/release
RPG: WASD + E to interactPlatformer: A and D to move left/right. Space to jumpText Adventure: Keyboard only
___________________________________________________________________________________

Tips and Tricks
Things you do in one game affect all the other games... For example, moving a chair in First Person can give you a floor to jump on in the Platformer!
Whenever you get stuck, Charlie's journal in the RPG world will give you a hint on how to progress.
If you truly get stuck, here is a list of every step to complete the game: https://pastebin.com/dJSDieUg.
*Note: Recent file release = game-breaking bug found and patchedInstall the zip file and unzip in your designated folder, then open GoodbyeCharlie.exe.
If you found a game-breaking bug and you are unable to progress, please comment when it happened and I will fix it. In the meantime, if you don't want to have to start over again, here is instructions on how to manually clear the next checkpoint and it will only take a minute. https://pastebin.com/iK37Kr03

details.title: The Void Between - Demo
details.description:
When one man's dream holiday turns into a nightmare, it's up to you to save him from himself...
Can you decipher the puzzles and solve the mysteries that will uncover the truth behind this mysterious place, or will you descend deeper into the darkness of the Void?
The Void Between is an FMV style puzzle game that leads you through a labyrinth of mysterious challenges and puzzling obstacles. 
Thanks a lot for playing! 🕹️
If you enjoyed the demo you can Wishlist the game here - https://store.steampowered.com/app/2678440/The_Void_Between/ 
You can follow along with development on this game and other projects here -
🕸️-  www.KeyCompassGames.com
BlueSky 🦋 - https://bsky.app/profile/keycompassgames.bsky.social
X - https://x.com/KeyCompassGames
Have a great day! ✨
We are currently working on The Void Between and excited to be expanding the story and adding more puzzles / different gameplay mechanics.  We will be releasing the full game on Steam soon.

Game play notes -
The game plays best when you refresh the browser and play in full screen.  (Chrome & Edge work best).Pease let us know about any bugs and we will do our best to fix them in the next update :) If you have any feedback we would love to hear! Thanks a lot!



The Void Between - Trailer
The Void Between is inspired by point and click puzzlers like Broken Sword. It was originally created as part of the Brackey's Game jam using GDevelop by two brother's Ben & Chris who are based in the north of England. 
Some of the music & SFX used in the game are from YouTube's Audio Library inside their creator studio , they are royalty free & eligible for monetisation: 
https://www.youtube.com/t/terms

Everything Other Than Controls:
You're a slime, living on a planet with its sun at its core. It's been heating up too much recently, causing all sorts of problems, and only you can stop it! (Everyone else doesn't have the energy, slime's aren't great with heat...)
Made for the Brackeys 2023.2 gamejam, with the theme "Diving Deeper", and finished/uploaded at 2:14AM!
The font, RottenDayOk, was made by Pictocat.
Software Used, In Case Somebody's Curious
Engine - Godot 4 (Mobile renderer for Win/Linux, Compatibility renderer for web)
Art - Krita
Music - Studio One 6
SharedArrayBuffer/Blocked Page Issues Update
TL;DR - If the web version doesn't work on your computer, please use Chrome to download the executable, or download from Google Drive.
The issues with playing the game in browser and downloading it seem to stem from Itch.io's SharedArrayBuffer support currently being experimental. Enabling SharedArrayBuffer support prevents downloads in Firefox, but they still work in Chrome and other Chromium-based browsers.Note: Downloads only work from Chrome at the moment, due to my game requiring SharedArrayBuffer. If you would prefer not to use Chrome, you can also download the game from Google Drive here.
Download the .exe or .x86_64 and run it! The only necessary file is the executable.

resultData.title: Solar Diver - Brackey Game Jam Edition

game.short_text: Dive into the Star's Core!
game.title: Solar Diver - Brackey Game Jam Edition

details.title: Solar Diver - Brackey Game Jam Edition
details.description:
Post Game Jam Updated Version Now Available: Solar Diver
Description
Solar Diver is a game made in 7 days for Brackeys 2023.2 Game Jam. The theme of the Jam was "Diving Deeper". 
Solar Diver is a space shooter action game inspired by the Flash Game series Learn to Fly and Toss the Turtle. Your objective is to launch your ships into the depths of the Solar System, and reach the Star at the core. Along the way, you will need to dodge various asteroids and enemy craft, and upgrade your ship so that it can travel further into the depths.
Highscores will automatically be submitted to the Leaderboard at the end of each Attempt.

Controls
[Spacebar] to Launch Craft
[A, D] to move left/right
[S] to slow down
(Your ship will accelerate forward automatically)
Menus can be navigated by mouse only.

Credits
To be released shortly...
All Asset modifications were made by the Developer, Roaming Maelstrom

Feedback and Constructive Criticism is Welcomed and Encouraged.

details.title: Let your balls fall
details.description:
This game is made under Brackeys 10th Gamejam!
May lag if played in OperaGX browser (Firefox recommended)
The game is about a ball that wants to go the the deepest part of a cave, but he only has so many layers of protection before he breaks! Your mission is to help him find the best way down and upgrade him along the way!

game.short_text: Explore a beautiful underwater world but take care to not get out of fuel
game.title: Explorer's Descent

details.title: Explorer's Descent
details.description:
Explore a beautiful underwater world with your submarine!
Unfortunately, you did not refuel enough to reach the ground. So enter your little Explorer-submarine to collect bio mass - plants and fishes - to further refuel your mothership and go deeper and deeper.....!
But take care! Your Explorer is small and vulnerable. Hopefully there are no dangerous creatures down there.

PS: Can you find all the hidden places?

Controls:
When in Mothership:
Move - WASD / Arrow KeysLeave Mothership and enter Explorer - E
When in Explorer
Move - WASD / Arrow KeysCollect - Space / ClickEnter Mothership - EBoost - Shift


About the game:
We are two people from Germany making games in our free time after work. This game has been made within 7 days for the Brackeys Jam 2023.
Visual assets used:
Quirky Series UltimateFantasy Skybox FREEPolygon PiratesPolygon NatureGUI PRO Kit - Casual Game
Sounds & music used:
Pixabay
Submarines, plants, buildings, some fishes and shaders have been created by us.
We are happy to provide a full list of the used assets on request.


Changelog
v0.1.2Bugfix: On Game over, the depth display is not visible anymoreBugfix: Boost bar will be hidden when full or when controlling the mothershipBugfix: It is not possible to collect enemies nowWindows

details.title: Echoes Vol. 1

Please make sure you listen to the prologue. This game is heavily story driven!Description:Enter a gripping tale of mystery, guilt, and discovery set against the haunting depths of the ocean. You play as Dr. Devin Carpenter, a man choosing to grab hold of his past as he navigates the last hours of his life. You must guide a drone submarine through a dark maze to free yourself both physically and emotionally. As the drone descends through an abyss filled with secrets and danger, revelations unfold that will have the player wanting to know more.
Controls:
Action    KeyboardControllerMovementWASD / Arrow KeysLeft StickActivate SonarSpaceSouth ButtonPauseEscapeStart

details.title: The Deep Descent

Is this game going to be updated in the future? Definitely, and I don't just mean small improvements either. 
Are there bugs? Probably. Another reason why I'm updating the game in the future.

game.short_text: A luminescent deep sea adventure
game.title: Titan: Deeper Than Dark

details.title: Titan: Deeper Than Dark
details.description:
Titan: Deeper Than Dark
This game was made for the Brackeys Game Jam 2023_2. Downloading it is HIGHLY RECOMMENDED. The WebGL version suffers from crashes and fish behavior issues.
WARNING: Security flaws were discovered in Unity (the game engine used for this project. As such, this game is considered vulnerable when played using the downloadable files. The WebGL version is safe.

A little note: This game utilities compute shaders to simulate fish movement. Downloading the game as an app will provide much better performance and is HIGHLY RECOMMENDED. We don't really have time to fix this - nor do we know where to start on it - but the fish seem to act differently on WebGL (browser) builds.

A luminescent deep sea adventure:
Control your very own submarineSwim around with glowing fish to light your pathFight evil robots - or "mechs"
Our team on this project:
    
CarlitoChicken
ShardOfKyran
ImDaBigBoss
The MacOS isn't signed, sorry.
The Linux build was not tested, if you have issues, please tell us.

game.short_text: Venture deep into the mines, seeking wealth, glory and maybe something else..
game.title: Echoed Depths

details.title: Echoed Depths
details.description:
Embark on a journey into the abyss with 'Echoed Depths,' a captivating 2D mining game that plunges you into a pixelated realm of mystery and peril. Delve deeper into an infinitely sprawling mine, navigating a world rich with diverse blocks, precious coins, and lurking enemies. As you descend, keep an eye on your oxygen meter, knowing each swing of your pickaxe consumes your lifeline, and beware of the encroaching darkness that can consume even the bravest.

Uncover hidden riches, challenge daunting foes, and gather coins to shape your destiny. But the perilous depths are not your only adversary – a lurking evil, echoing through the pixelated void, seeks to consume the unwary. Your health is at stake, vulnerable to enemies and explosive 'bombs' that dot the caverns.

However, beyond the challenges lies opportunity. Collect your hard-earned coins to unlock a plethora of upgrades and items, each offering a new way to navigate the treacherous terrain. Will you fortify your health and oxygen to withstand the shadows, or enhance your mining prowess to reap greater rewards?

Beneath the surface lies more than just blocks and foes; 'Echoed Depths' weaves an enigmatic lore within its code, waiting to be unveiled by the astute. Discover the secrets of a forgotten village, the curse that befell its inhabitants, and the path that led an outcast to salvation. As you venture deeper into the game, your connection to its hidden narrative will grow, merging with the thrill of exploration.

Are you ready to descend into the unknown, to mine for treasures, and to unearth a tale that echoes through the ages? Plunge into 'Echoed Depths' and forge your legacy amid the challenges of darkness and the allure of the depths.


Echoed depths was developed for the Brackeys game jam 2023.2 with the theme of "Diving Deeper"

game.short_text: A (very) short platformer made for the Brackeys Game Jam!
game.title: Volcanic Abyss

details.title: Volcanic Abyss
details.description:
For hundreds of years, legends have told of a great treasure hidden deep at the bottom of an active volcano. Despite the warnings of the locals, many adventurers have tried... and failed. But that won't stop you! Enter the depths of the fiery abyss and use the mechanisms created by the ancient people to make the deadly lava sink lower, allowing you to dive deeper and deeper. With pools of magma and deadly traps (literally just spikes)  even your trusty fire proximity suit won't protect you for long.
Controls:
- A and D (or arrow keys) to move left and right.
- Press spacebar to jump. A short tap will make you quickly hop while a long press will make you leap high into the air.
 - Wow this list is short.
This game was made in 3 days for the Brackeys Game Jam 2023.2 with the theme "Diving Deeper" I knew a big chunk of participants would make a game about diving underwater so I had think hard. Since lava is pretty much the opposite of water, this was the most unobvious, and probably original, choice. I only have 4 short levels, but I hope you find them at least mildly amusing.
Enjoy!
Oh yeah and sorry about the lever sprite I have no idea what itch.io did to it.
My brother was pretty mad the end screen said nothing about treasure so if you see the big letters that say "THE END" just pretend you became a billionaire or something.
5th place in graphics LETS GOOOOOOOOOOOO!!!!! Thank you everybody!

game.short_text: Gather resources for the home planet and dive deeper into space!
game.title: UFO

details.title: UFO
details.description:
MADE FOR BRACKEYS GAME JAM 2023.2 "Diving Deeper" Fly around in space and gather items for your home! Dive deeper and deeper into the cold, vast and infinite space in an unidentified, friendly object. Enjoy diving through different parts of space. Some cold, some warm, and some, just normal! And don't forget to upgrade your friendly object as you go, it'll make the journey a little easier. :) Careful to not let the fuel run out or you might lose a life!HOW TO MOVE: Steer the UFO with A and D, suck up items with SPACE BAR, that's all!

game.short_text: A submarine on a diplomatic mission to Atlantis has crashed... You must find out why...
game.title: The Atlantis Inquiry

details.title: The Atlantis Inquiry
details.description:
Created in 7 days for Brackeys Jam 2023.2 
Theme: Diving Deeper
As usual, play the PC build for full experience. WebGL hates nice sound mixing...

Team 
-  Eurus - Programmer
-  Magpie - Artist, Programmer
- Wes - Designer 
- Cal - Sound Engineer 
Synopsis 
There has been a mysterious malfunction in a submarine dispatched on a diplomatic mission to Atlantis. You have been sent to investigate, but what else will you uncover? 
Controls 
W - Up (Swimming only)
A - Left 
D - Right 
Space - Jump 
S - Crouch 
E - Interact 
Mouse click - Select 
Tips 
Search for clues by talking to the various inhabitants of Atlantis and submarine crew. 
Make your deductions and inform Poseidon's guard of your conclusions.
Open the game in full window for fewer visual glitches.

game.short_text: Brackeys Game Jam 2023.2
game.title: Biscuit Rescue

details.title: Biscuit Rescue
details.description:
Good heavens, it appears that you've dropped your biscuit into your warm beverage! But does this truly mean the end for your delectable snack?Deploy the Biscuit Rescue Submarine and dive deep into the glass to retrieve your quickly-dissolving biscuit. 
ControlsMove with W, A, S and D, or use the Arrow KeysExtend the biscuit-grabbing claw with the Space BarPause gameplay with BackspaceDisclaimer: Level Three cannot be fully completed at present.EnemiesSticky BubbleSticks to the player, slowing them down.Oversized BacteriaMoves backwards and forwards along a set path.Coffee GranuleSteals a portion of biscuit from the player. Biscuit is reclaimed by poking the thieving granule with your claw.Caffeine MonsterTravels quickly across the glass, releasing deadly caffeine rockets.CoffeefishAn unstoppable  school of coffeefish that deal large amounts of damage to those unfortunate enough to stand in their way.Chocolate BarnacleExtends its sticky tongue, awaiting its next meal. Use the claw to escape from its clutches before it's too late!

game.short_text: Clean a hoarders basement and dive deeper into how they got like this
game.title: Carolines Basement

details.title: Carolines Basement
details.description:
A Game made for the Brackeys Game Jam 2023.2.
 Our goal was to interpret the theme "going deeper" as an exploration into the mind of a hoarder, by having you clean out a hoarder's basement and discover what led them to get into this position. It's quite a short game (even we were surprised) but I hope it's somewhat fun!
This is our first game jam and we are generally proud of the project, there was a lot of scope creep and mistakes due to us not knowing our limits yet however I thoroughly enjoyed the process. I hope to continue doing game jams!
Any feedback or advice for the game or in general is welcome!

Credits
Art made by BreadMusic made by BreadisleBaby

game.short_text: Brave the Beast. Dive the depths. Save yourself.
game.title: Into Leviathan

details.title: Into Leviathan
details.description:
The great beam of the lighthouse guides me forward, now, a petty torch against the glittering eyes of the deep.


Into Leviathan is a short horror game about piloting a submersible into the depths of a great monster. Top off your oxygen and keep your hull intact while searching for the scrap needed to upgrade your vessel and descend ever deeper. None have yet survived the journey. Will you be the first?
With every upgrade, the weight of your submersible increases. The more you weigh, the deeper you can go...until you can find what awaits in the depths.
This game was developed by Team ElseWare in seven days for the 2023 Brackeys Game Jam with the theme "Dive Deeper", and features original art, music, and sound, including fully voiced narration.
Controls
Move: A/DSpace: Ascend
